zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard Mollenes于1120年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可盧加姆。他于1147年之前与Mrs Richard Mollenes在英国结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Richard Mollenes was born in 1120, in Rougham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. He married Mrs Richard Mollenes before 1147, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Mollenes est né en 1120, à Rougham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a épousé Mrs Richard Mollenes avant 1147, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Richard Mollenes wurde 1120 in Rougham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren. Er hat vor 1147 in England Mrs Richard Mollenes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Richard Mollenes è nato il nel 1120 nel Rougham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lui sposato Mrs Richard Mollenes prima del 1147, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.Rougham, Mitford, Norfolk, England: イギリスイギリスノーフォルクロウアム
ja.Rougham,Mitford,Norfolk,England: イギリスイギリスノーフォルクロウアム
ja.lifeSummary: Richard Mollenesは1120年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクロウアムで生まれた。1147年以前にイギリスでMrs Richard Mollenesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Mollenes(은)는 1120년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 루그함에서 태어났다. 그는 1147년 이전 영국에서 Mrs Richard Mollenes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard Mollenes nasceu em 1120, em Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele casou-se com Mrs Richard Mollenes antes 1147, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard Mollenes родился в 1120 г. в местности роугам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Richard Mollenes перед 1147 г. в местности Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Richard Mollenes nació en 1120, en Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Mrs Richard Mollenes antes de 1147, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en su pueblo.
